parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Customer

box "Shopware Platform" #E2E2E2
participant Checkout
participant "Asynchronous\nPayment Handler" as Handler
end box

box "External System" #E2E2E2
entity "Payment Platform" as PaymentPlatform
end box

Customer --> Checkout : pay
Checkout --> Handler : pay
Handler --> Customer : redirect
Customer --> PaymentPlatform : pay
PaymentPlatform --> Checkout : redirect
Checkout --> Handler : finalize

@enduml
```
